classification.rationale: This thread is coordinating a real-world meetup with substantive structure: a negotiated date (May 21), a confirmed venue (Mission Workshop), a run-of-show (doors 6pm, Sam talk 6:30, Theo LT 7:30, social 7:45–9), named attendees with logistics (Jess's arrival, dietary needs), and an open deadline (dietary list to Maya by May 18). That easily clears the EventView threshold. The respect_minimal_threads constraint doesn't apply here given the structural complexity, and surface_open_items_at_top and extract_blockers_with_owners apply to surface pending items like Sam's abstract and the dietary roster.

state.title: AI Dev Tools Meetup — May 21
state.status_rationale: Date (May 21) and venue (Mission Workshop) are both locked in per Iris's instruction to Mara to confirm with Maya and Maya's confirmation of availability.

schedule.item: Sam Hartman — 'Agent Observability' talk (20 min) + Q&A (10 min)
Theo Park — Lightning talk on lineage primitives (10 min)

attendees.name: Iris ten Teije
attendees.note: Lead organizer; handling invites, RSVP collection, and dietary roster.

attendees.name: Mara Yi
attendees.note: Venue liaison; needs to formally confirm booking with Maya and send dietary list by May 18.

attendees.name: Theo Park
attendees.note: 10-min lightning talk on lineage primitives at 7:30. Had visa appointment conflict on May 14 — now resolved with May 21 date.

attendees.name: Sam Hartman
attendees.note: 20-min talk on agent observability + 10-min Q&A at 6:30. Has a custom HDMI dongle situation — asked to bring his own as backup. Title/abstract due to Iris by Friday May 8.

attendees.name: Maya Singh
attendees.note: Mission Workshop contact. Dietary needs deadline: Mon May 18. Hard cap: 28 people (fire code). $850 venue fee.

attendees.name: Jess Tan
attendees.note: Flying in from NYC; flight lands SFO 5:30pm — likely late arrival, expected around 7:00–7:15pm at earliest. Vegetarian — must be included in dietary list sent to Maya by May 18.

decisions_log.question: Which date to hold the meetup?
decisions_log.resolution: May 21 — May 14 ruled out by Theo's visa appointment; May 21 preferred by Theo and accepted by all.

decisions_log.question: Which venue?
decisions_log.resolution: Mission Workshop — confirmed available for May 21 at $850 for the evening.

decisions_log.question: Who speaks and in what format?
decisions_log.resolution: Sam Hartman (20+10 min on agent observability) + Theo Park (10-min lightning talk on lineage primitives), followed by social.

decisions_log.question: Whether to arrange catering through Mission Workshop's partner?
Budget approval for $850 venue fee?
decisions_log.resolution: Approved — Iris confirmed it fits team budget.

top_actions.title: Formally confirm Mission Workshop booking with Maya
top_actions.detail: Iris instructed Mara to lock it in but no confirmation to Maya has been sent yet in the thread.

top_actions.title: Sam Hartman: send talk title & abstract
top_actions.detail: Needed to publish the event invite; Sam committed to delivering by Friday May 8.

top_actions.title: Send dietary list to Maya by May 18 deadline
top_actions.detail: At least one vegetarian (Jess Tan) confirmed; full RSVP list needed first to compile complete roster.

top_actions.title: Collect RSVPs and compile invite list
top_actions.detail: Iris planned to send invites and gather RSVPs to build the dietary roster; not yet done as of last message.

top_actions.title: Decide on catering
top_actions.detail: Mission Workshop has a catering partner available but the team hasn't confirmed whether to use it.
